title: selection.*: remove all spots which increase the updateDepth
selection.grid & table: move the initialisation of custom item arrays outside of construct()
selection.Model: select() => limit deselectAll() to the main items collection
selection.grid.ColumnModel: detach the logic from event paths
selection.grid.CellModel: adjust the basic navigation logic
grid.Container: addResizeObserver() => lazy load the addon, in case it is not inside mainThreadAddons
table.Container: move the selectionModel to table.View
